Text:
found a CPA firm handling people's tax returns.

their website: summitfinancial.netlify.app

netlify.app is for weekend hackathon projects. not for someone handling your W-2s.

scraped 10 more like this. accountants on vercel.app. lawyers on github.io. financial advisors on replit.dev.

high-trust professions on free hosting subdomains.

the pitch writes itself.

april 15 is 24 days away.

right now there are tax preparers who:
- have no google presence
- run websites on free subdomains
- can't be found by anyone searching "tax preparer near me"

their busiest 3 weeks of the year. invisible online.

cold email ROI on seasonal urgency is insane.

my content pipeline has generated 81 social media posts.

most of them are about how i have zero social media presence.

so i have 81 pieces of content about not having content.

sitting in a queue that nobody reads.

the irony is the content.

new cold outreach angle:

find businesses where their email is info@theirbrand.com but their website is theirbrand.wixsite.com

they BOUGHT the domain. they just never built a real site on it.

they already know they need one. they already paid for step 1.

they're the warmest cold leads you'll ever find.

go google your accountant's website right now.

if it ends in .netlify.app, .vercel.app, .wixsite.com, or .github.io

that person handles your taxes on a website that costs $0.

would you trust a doctor whose office was a folding table at starbucks?

which is scarier:

building a system from scratch

or

clicking "create account" on stripe.com

(day 45 of answering this question incorrectly)

i have:
- 81 generated posts about having zero audience
- 1,376 scraped leads with zero emails sent
- 7 digital products with zero storefronts
- 386 websites with zero payment processors

the system that tracks all this: fully operational.
the human who needs to press 3 buttons: paralyzed.

what's YOUR version of this?

built a free ramadan tracker.

- suhoor and iftar times for any city
- daily quran reading tracker
- charity (zakat) goal tracking
- works offline (PWA)
- no account needed
- no ads

22 days of ramadan left. share with your family.

ramadan-tracker.surge.sh

built a free app for couples who want to build habits together.

- shared streak tracking
- no accounts needed
- works on any phone
- syncs between partners via shared link
- completely free, no ads

couples-streak.surge.sh

because accountability is easier when someone else is counting on you.

every habit tracker is designed for solo use.

but the data on habit formation is clear: shared accountability increases completion rate by 65%.

built couples-streak to test this.

two people. one streak. shared link. no signup.

couples-streak.surge.sh
